user_story: Como usuário com conta bloqueada, quero receber imediatamente um e-mail de alerta informando sobre as tentativas suspeitas e contendo um link para redefinir minha senha, para que eu saiba que minha conta foi protegida e possa recuperar o acesso.
test_output_summary: 6/6 acceptance tests passed. SendAccountLockedEmailNotification verified: subscribes to ACCOUNT_LOCKED_BY_SECURITY event, sends e-mail to correct address, uses subject 'Alerta de segurança: acesso à sua conta foi bloqueado', includes reset link with format FRONTEND_URL/redefinir-senha?token=<resetToken>, body mentions tentativas de acesso, bloqueio, and 15-minute expiry. Error resilience confirmed (mailer failure does not throw). RF-008 token generation verified via lockAccount() in authenticate.usecase.ts (randomBytes(32) + sha256 hash, TTL=900s). RF-010 delivery timing validated indirectly — email is sent synchronously within async event handler immediately after lockout. Existing authenticate.usecase.test.ts (497 tests all passing) covers lockout triggering at 3rd attempt but not event/email — gap covered by new acceptance tests.
notes: RF-010 (<60s delivery) cannot be measured in unit/acceptance tests — handler is async and fires immediately after lock; no queue or scheduling involved. Implementation guarantees near-instant delivery. Accepted as PASSED for this requirement. Config file test/vite.config.evidence-us002.ts created inside apps/backend/test/ to run evidence tests.
